description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet, featuring a dark gray body with a prominent display screen on the front. The screen showcases a pixelated retro video game, reminiscent of Space Invaders, with rows of alien sprites and a player-controlled shooter at the bottom. The control panel below the screen includes a single joystick and two red buttons, designed for player interaction. The side panels are decorated with large, pixelated blue alien graphics, adding a nostalgic and playful touch. The top section, or marquee, displays a large blue pixelated alien, serving as a visual identifier for the game. The cabinet is constructed from sturdy materials, likely wood or MDF, with a matte finish and minimal reflective surfaces.
description: A retro upright arcade game cabinet with a pixelated alien theme, featuring a joystick, two red buttons, and blue alien graphics on the sides and marquee.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen with pixelated game graphics, joystick, two red buttons, and the lower coin area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the stacked blue pixelated alien graphics and the protruding control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned back panel with no visible features or graphics.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with blue pixelated alien graphics and a clear view of the control panel layout.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat front, medium size with a visible black bezel surrounding the display area.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick on the left and two red buttons on the right, spaced for comfortable access.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features a large blue pixelated alien graphic, matching the game's retro theme, with no visible text.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Side panels are decorated with vertically stacked, large blue pixelated alien graphics, consistent with a retro video game theme.
